column1: GTCO remains committed to promoting gender equality and women empowerment. The ratio of women in
the employment of the Bank and in senior management positions is currently 49.5% and 42%, respectively.
The percentage of women on our Board of Directors is currently at 57%. The Company celebrated the
International Men's Day (IMD 2023) themed “Zero Male Suicide” which focused on raising awareness of men’s
well-being. The bank celebrated the event through activities such as webinars on substance abuse and
addiction, managing stress, anger management, financial management, Men’s dress-up contest, Sport Trivia,
